title: At the Dinner Table
description: Common Bulgarian words and phrases you will hear or use at home, at dinner, or during family meals.

content.title: Table Vocabulary
content.description: Start with the everyday words you need around food and the table.

rows: Often paired with forks and knives

content.title: Useful Phrases
content.description: Polite, natural phrases for family meals and shared food.

content.note: A polite and practical request at the table.
The word 'още' is very useful in restaurants and at home.
A simple compliment that works in any meal setting.

content.en: Shall I pour you some water?
content.note: A friendly offer you might hear in a household.

content.title: Meal-Time Etiquette
content.description: A few cultural and language habits that help you sound natural.

content.title: Things to remember
items: Use polite forms when speaking to adults or guests.
Offer food or water with simple, direct phrases.
Complimenting the food is a good social habit.
Meal conversations often use short, friendly sentences.

content.title: Conversation tip
content.text: At the table, short sentences are normal. You do not need to speak in long, complex grammar to be understood.

content.title: Practice
content.description: A quick self-check for the most useful table phrases.
